title: Transnational Crime Entities
narrative: Retrieve organizations engaged in international illicit activities, including the type of activity, cooperating groups, and the countries where they operate or coordinate.

title: Polio Control Status
narrative: The user seeks an assessment of the global control of poliomyelitis, covering vaccination coverage, incidence trends, and expert opinions to determine whether the disease is currently under control worldwide.

title: Hubble Accomplishments
narrative: Locate and summarize the positive achievements of the Hubble Space Telescope since its 1991 launch, focusing on scientific discoveries, milestones, and notable contributions to astronomy while omitting failures or controversies.

title: Endangered Mammal Review
narrative: Provide a list of endangered mammal species, including their natural habitats and primary threats.

title: Crashworthiness Rankings
narrative: Identify the passenger vehicles that have the highest and lowest crashworthiness ratings based on formal crash test results from reputable agencies such as NHTSA, Euro NCAP, IIHS, or equivalent authorities, excluding models without published crash test data.

title: Civilian Deaths in African Civil Wars
narrative: The user seeks reliable estimates of civilian non‑combatant fatalities that occurred during civil wars across Africa, including major conflicts such as the Second Congo War, Sierra Leone, Liberia, Somalia, and others.  Relevance is judged by the presence of credible, conflict‑specific casualty figures from reputable sources (e.g., UN, WHO, peer‑reviewed studies) and by excluding combatant casualties, non‑African wars, or non‑civilian death counts.

title: Hydropower Projects
narrative: Search for reports or news articles that describe hydroelectric power projects either proposed or under construction, including details such as the country, specific location, project scope, objectives, potential issues, and expected impacts.

title: Tooth Implant Pros/Cons
narrative: User seeks a balanced overview of the advantages and disadvantages of dental implants, including clinical outcomes, cost, and patient satisfaction, compared with other tooth replacement options.

title: Negative Rap Influence
narrative: Identify empirical studies or credible reports that demonstrate rap music has a detrimental effect on adolescents' behavior, academic performance, or health.

title: Radio Waves & Brain Cancer
narrative: Identify peer‑reviewed studies, systematic reviews, and epidemiological analyses that examine the relationship between radio frequency exposure from cell towers and mobile phones and the incidence of brain cancer. Relevance requires empirical evidence, appropriate exposure assessment, control for confounding factors, and clear statistical associations between exposure levels and brain tumor outcomes.

title: Trade Secret Theft Sources
narrative: Documents discussing theft of trade secrets, focusing on how information is obtained through trade journals, business meetings, patent office data, trade shows, and analysis of competitor products.

title: Hydroponic Gardening
narrative: Looking for technical information on the science and techniques of growing plants in water or other non‑soil media, including nutrient solutions, plant physiology, and system design.

title: Commercial Magnetic Levitation
narrative: Information on real-world commercial applications of magnetic levitation technology, including industry deployments, products, and business use cases.

title: Seaweed Harvesting
narrative: User seeks detailed information on commercial harvesting practices, regulations, and sustainability of marine vegetation such as algae, seaweed, and kelp that are used for food and pharmaceutical production.

title: Unresolved Fatal Accidents
narrative: Retrieve the annual number of fatal highway accidents whose causes remained unresolved. The documents must provide yearly counts, focus on highway incidents, include fatalities, and indicate that the causes were not determined.

title: Polygamy Roots
narrative: Information on the historical origins and present‑day prevalence of polygamy worldwide.

title: Junk Fax Regulation
narrative: Find whether the FCC has enacted regulations banning junk fax transmissions and assess the effectiveness of those regulations in reducing unwanted fax usage.

title: Best Retiree Country
narrative: Determine, excluding the United States, which country offers superior living conditions and quality of life for U.S. retirees. Relevance depends on factors such as cost of living, climate, healthcare quality, safety, tax considerations, and overall ease of relocation for Americans.

title: Alternative Fuel Research
narrative: The user is looking for current research initiatives, studies, and reports on emerging fuel sources such as biofuels, hydrogen, synthetic fuels, and other innovative technologies. Relevance is determined by the presence of recent, scientifically rigorous documents that describe ongoing experiments, projects, and breakthrough developments, while excluding historical data or non‑research materials.

title: Flag Undersea Cable
narrative: The user is looking for details on the Flag fiber‑optic cable that is planned to become the world’s longest undersea line, specifically who is behind the project, the extent and technical specifications of the system, and the known problems or challenges associated with its deployment and operation.

title: Women in Parliaments
narrative: Search for documents that analyze the persistent underrepresentation of women in national parliaments worldwide, with particular emphasis on the large gender gap in political power in developing countries.

title: Art Trade Fraud
narrative: Locate documents that document or provide evidence of fraud or embezzlement within the international art trade, such as theft, money laundering, false provenance claims, or related legal cases. Relevance is determined by explicit mention of criminal activity or investigations concerning cross‑border art transactions.

title: Plagiarism in Writing
narrative: Identify documented cases of text copying between literary and journalistic pieces, including investigative reports, academic analyses, and court or editorial records.

title: Argentina‑Britain Relations
narrative: Define the nature, history, and evolution of diplomatic relations between Argentina and the United Kingdom, including key conflicts and agreements, and describe the current bilateral status.

title: Cult Profile Analysis
narrative: Gather information on a specific cult, including its official name, and outline the typical day-to-day activities of its members as observed or reported.

title: Ferry Sinkings Over 100
narrative: Retrieve reports of ferry sinkings that resulted in the loss of 100 or more lives.

title: Human Slavery 80s-90s
narrative: Locate a country or city where credible evidence confirms the practice of human slavery during the 1980s or 1990s. Relevant sources should include reliable historical reports, scholarly articles, or credible institutional documentation that explicitly describe slavery or forced‑labor conditions within the specified geographic area and time period.

title: Beatified Individuals
narrative: Retrieve a person who has been officially beatified by the Pope.

title: Mexico City Air Pollution Measures
narrative: Identify documents that detail specific steps and policies adopted by Mexican authorities to mitigate air pollution in Mexico City.

title: Iran-Iraq Cooperation
narrative: Find examples of cooperation, friendly ties, or potential alliances between Iran and Iraq. Relevance is determined by documents that describe joint actions, agreements, statements, or any evidence of friendly relations between the two countries.

title: World Bank Critiques
narrative: Collect evidence of criticisms directed at the World Bank, covering its policies, activities, and personnel, focusing on issues of effectiveness, representation, transparency, and accountability.

title: Tax Evasion Investigations
narrative: Find source documents that report on investigations specifically targeting individuals or entities that have evaded U.S. federal income tax.

title: Antibiotic Resistance
narrative: Explain the rising bacterial resistance to antibiotics, covering genetic, environmental, and clinical factors, and identify credible evidence indicating why older treatments are less effective.

title: Encryption Export Controls
narrative: Seek evidence on whether maintaining export controls on encryption software remains useful and effective. Relevance includes studies, analyses, reports, or policy papers that evaluate the impact and effectiveness of such export controls.

title: Parent‑Adopt Relationship Issues
narrative: The user seeks to identify common problems that arise in the interactions among biological parents, adoptive parents, and their shared children, and to find documented solutions or interventions to address these issues. Relevance is judged by sources that discuss relational dynamics, conflict resolution, or therapeutic approaches within adoption contexts.

title: Black Bear Violence
narrative: Find documents that provide statistical data on worldwide black bear attack incidents and analyze factors contributing to aggressive behavior.

title: Viral Hepatitis Research
narrative: The user seeks academic and clinical studies on viral hepatitis and wants to know what progress has been achieved in treating the disease. Relevance criteria include peer‑reviewed articles, systematic reviews, clinical trials, and authoritative guidelines that describe new therapies, vaccine development, and treatment outcomes.

title: Repeated Aspirin Side Effects
narrative: Information on adverse effects experienced by individuals who take aspirin repeatedly, focusing on side effects and complications associated with frequent or long-term aspirin use.

title: Alzheimer’s Drug Efficacy
narrative: Retrieve information on pharmacologic agents used to treat Alzheimer’s disease, including approved and investigational drugs, and summarize clinical evidence of their effectiveness.

title: Landmine Treaty Actions
narrative: Identify initiatives, agreements, or policies undertaken by nations or international bodies that promote the global ban on production, transfer, and use of land mines.

title: International Flight Screening
narrative: Documents that evaluate the effectiveness of government orders that increase scrutiny of passengers and luggage on international flights, with a focus on enhanced carry‑on baggage screening, are relevant.

title: Diplomatic Trade Espionage
narrative: Find documented cases where individuals with diplomatic status have attempted to acquire sensitive trade, technology, or classified industrial project information since the end of the Cold War.

title: Civilian Police Killings
narrative: Identify documented incidents in which a civilian police officer was killed while performing official duties or due to their association with policing activities—such as retaliation for armed possession, attempts to suppress testimony, or other related motives. Relevance is limited to confirmed deaths where the officer was a civilian police law‑enforcement employee at the time and the killing was directly linked to their policing role or its circumstances.

title: E‑mail Abuse Controls
narrative: The user is looking for documents that describe the measures taken worldwide by the organizations or entities that bear the cost of e‑mail services to reduce or prevent abuses such as spam, phishing, and other malicious use.  Relevance criteria include reports, white papers, legal regulations, industry standards, corporate policies, and academic studies that discuss implemented controls, mitigation strategies, compliance frameworks, and enforcement actions related to e‑mail communications.  Irrelevant results are opinions, anecdotal blogs, and general overviews that do not specifically address cost‑bearing entities’ lawful or technical responses to e‑mail abuse.

title: Overseas Effects of US Tobacco Health Campaigns
narrative: Find studies and reports that assess how U.S. health research and the resulting economic impact have influenced tobacco consumption, pricing, regulation, and market dynamics in countries outside the United States. Relevance is judged by evidence of foreign market changes directly linked to U.S. health policy or economic pressures on U.S. tobacco firms.

title: Foreign Pre‑Teen Standards
narrative: Identify countries outside the U.S. that have formally established national education standards for pre‑teen students, and describe the specific standards set, to help evaluate U.S. standards against international examples.

title: Global Wildlife Conservation
narrative: Identify countries that have taken measures to prevent the decline or extinction of native wildlife species, mirroring the U.S. spotted owl program; relevance requires evidence of national policy or conservation initiatives targeting specific species.

title: Agoraphobia Prevalence
narrative: Find evidence on how common agoraphobia is and whether it is widely recognized.

title: Cell Metabolism
narrative: Documents describing the biochemical reactions that sustain cellular health and generate energy, including pathways such as glycolysis, the citric acid cycle, and oxidative phosphorylation.

title: Computer Terminal Hazards
narrative: The user seeks evidence on whether daily use of computer terminals is hazardous to individuals’ health. Relevant documents should include studies, reviews, or official guidelines that discuss health effects such as eye strain, musculoskeletal disorders, and other conditions linked to prolonged computer use, along with recommendations for mitigation.

title: South Atlantic Petroleum
narrative: Search for data, reports, and assessments of petroleum exploration activities and findings in the South Atlantic area near the Falkland Islands.

title: Channel Tunnel Impact
narrative: Explore how the opening of the Channel Tunnel has influenced the British economy—through trade, tourism, and transportation—and altered the daily life and travel habits of British citizens, using data and evidence from the 1990s to present.

title: Antarctic Research Projects
narrative: Retrieve documents that describe systematic or planned scientific explorations of Antarctica—such as current expeditions, future missions, and research initiatives—while excluding generic descriptions or unrelated studies. Relevance is indicated by explicit mention of a research program, exploration plan, or investigation underway or scheduled in Antarctica.

title: Journalist Risk Events
narrative: Find documented cases where a journalist was exposed to personal danger—such as death, arrest, or hostage situations—while carrying out their professional work.

title: Spaceborne Ocean Remote Sensing
narrative: Retrieve documents that describe the development, calibration, deployment, and use of satellite‑borne sensors for observing ocean parameters (e.g., temperature, salinity, ocean color, sea level). The relevance criteria include discussion of sensor design, data processing, and applications to oceanographic science, climate monitoring, or marine resource management.

title: Postmenopausal Estrogen Britain
narrative: Retrieve documents that discuss the use of estrogen therapy among postmenopausal women in the United Kingdom, including medical references, clinical guidelines, regulatory information, and any relevant research studies or policy discussions.

title: Boundary Disputes
narrative: Search for documents that address disputes over international boundaries within the 200‑mile Exclusive Economic Zone or 12‑mile territorial sea that arose after the 1982 International Convention on the Law of the Sea was adopted.

title: BAC in Fatal Crashes
narrative: The user seeks evidence on how blood‑alcohol concentration (BAC) influences automobile accident fatalities. Relevant results should present empirical data, statistical analyses, or systematic reviews that examine the relationship between BAC levels and the likelihood or severity of fatal crashes. Documents that focus on non‑fatal injuries, general driving behavior, or non‑automotive incidents are not relevant.

title: Mutual Fund Performance Predictors
narrative: The user is looking for academic or empirical studies that identify reliable and consistent predictors of mutual fund performance. Relevance requires evidence of statistically significant predictors that have been validated across multiple periods and markets, typically through regression or panel analysis and demonstrating robustness in the presence of market volatility.

title: Drug Legalization Benefits
narrative: The user seeks an evidence‑based discussion of the benefits of legalizing drugs. Relevance requires sources that analyze economic, public health, societal, or criminal‑justice outcomes and argue for benefits supported by data, studies, or expert testimony.

title: Clothing Sweatshops
narrative: Retrieve documents that discuss sweatshop conditions in clothing manufacturing, covering topics such as labor exploitation, factory working conditions, and ethical consumer concerns.

title: Human Smuggling Incidents
narrative: Find documented incidents where individuals were illegally smuggled across borders, specifying date, location, method, and involved parties, for use in law‑enforcement or policy analysis.

title: Transportation Tunnel Disasters
narrative: The user is looking for documented incidents (accidents, structural failures, or other significant events) that occurred within tunnels used for transportation—such as rail, road, subway, or pedestrian tunnels—to understand the types of disasters, their causes, dates, and impacts.

title: Rabies Confirmation Actions
narrative: Retrieval of documents that report lab‑confirmed rabies cases and detail the follow‑up actions taken—such as diagnostics, treatment protocols, public health interventions, or policy measures. Articles should include both the confirmation evidence and the description of what, if anything, is being done in response.

title: El Niño Effects
narrative: The user seeks information on the climatic, environmental, and socioeconomic impacts attributed to El Niño events. Relevant documents should discuss documented effects such as rainfall anomalies, temperature changes, crop damage, fishery disruptions, and broader economic consequences linked to El Niño.

title: Cyanide Industrial Uses
narrative: Identify and describe the industrial and commercial applications of cyanide and its chemically related compounds.  Relevance is limited to uses that are commercially or industrially significant—such as mining, metallurgy, electroplating, or large‑scale chemical production—rather than laboratory‑scale or purely academic applications unless those methods are also employed at an industrial scale.

title: Boarding Piracy
narrative: List recent (post‑2000) piracy incidents where attackers boarded or seized control of vessels, focusing on traditional boarding tactics rather than remote or aerial attacks.

title: In Vitro Fertilization
narrative: Retrieve documents that discuss in vitro fertilization, including its methods, clinical applications, outcomes, and ethical or policy aspects. Relevant documents must explicitly address IVF procedures or related research.

title: Anorexia Bulimia Treatment
narrative: User seeks comprehensive information on the etiological factors and evidence‑based therapeutic interventions for anorexia nervosa and bulimia, including medical, psychological, and nutritional approaches. Relevance requires sources that discuss causation, risk factors, and evidence‑based treatment guidelines for both disorders.

title: Food & Drug Quality Law
narrative: User is looking for statutes, regulations, or legislation that address the quality control, labeling, and processing standards of foods, beverages, and pharmaceutical products.

title: Alternative Medicine Coverage
narrative: Determine which health insurance plans provide coverage for alternative or non‑traditional medical treatments, such as acupuncture, and describe the nature, extent, and limitations of that coverage.

title: Native Casino Growth
narrative: Find documents that discuss the growth of Native American casino gambling, including statistical trends, economic impacts, regulatory developments, and comparative analyses. Relevance requires mention of growth metrics, timeframes, and specific Native American tribes or casinos.

title: Encryption Export Concerns
narrative: Retrieve documents that cover U.S. concerns about exporting encryption equipment, focusing on policy discussions, regulatory actions, and security considerations.

title: Nobel Laureates Background
narrative: Provide a list of Nobel Prize laureates with concise biographical details such as birth year, nationality, field of award, and key accomplishments. Relevance is determined by the accuracy and completeness of the provided background information.

title: Hydrogen Energy Research
narrative: Identify recent academic and industry studies, reports, and reviews that assess the feasibility of hydrogen as an energy source. Relevance is judged by up‑to‑date data (within the last 5 years), coverage of technological advances, barriers, economic evaluations, scalability, and policy implications.

title: ICJ Case Types
narrative: The user wants to identify and describe the categories of legal disputes that have been brought before the World Court (International Court of Justice). Relevance includes discussions of controversies versus advisory opinions, and subjects such as territorial disputes, diplomatic and immunity issues, humanitarian law, environmental law, trade disputes, and treaty interpretation. Answers should provide a concise overview of these types or classifications of cases heard by the ICJ.

title: Cigar Resurgence
narrative: Identify documents discussing the recent revival and growing popularity of cigar smoking, including market trends, demographic shifts, cultural factors, marketing strategies, regulatory changes, and health implications.

title: Euro Opposition
narrative: Retrieve documents that discuss or analyze the opposition to introducing the euro as the European currency, including political, economic, and public resistance arguments.

title: Inclusive Education
narrative: Find documents that discuss placing children with physical or mental impairments into mainstream schools, covering policies, strategies, challenges, and outcomes.

title: Treating Obesity
narrative: Retrieve documents that discuss medical strategies for treating obesity, covering pharmacologic therapies, lifestyle interventions, and surgical approaches.

title: Alternative Medicine Effectiveness
narrative: Identify alternative medicine modalities employed to treat illnesses or diseases and assess their measurable success rates based on studies, trials, or outcome reports.

title: Hydrogen Fuel Cars
narrative: Documents that discuss using hydrogen as a fuel for piston‑driven automobiles while addressing safe storage concerns, or the use of hydrogen in fuel cells to generate electricity that powers the vehicle.

title: Psychotropic Medications
narrative: Retrieve all pharmacological agents (i.e., prescription drugs) that are officially indicated for the treatment of mental illnesses—including disorders such as depression, anxiety, schizophrenia, bipolar disorder, and PTSD. All returned items must be approved medications used in clinical practice; non‑pharmacological therapies, investigational agents, and recreational substances should be excluded.

title: Moon Colony Station
narrative: Documents that discuss the construction of a lunar space station explicitly intended to support colonization efforts on the Moon. Relevance requires a clear connection between the station’s design, purpose, or mission planning and the larger goal of establishing a permanent human presence on the Moon.

title: Hybrid Engine Status
narrative: Retrieve recent documents that evaluate the current state of hybrid automobile engines—such as plug‑in hybrids, fuel‑cell vehicles, and other non‑gasoline powered variants—focusing on their market and technological developments.

title: Teaching Disabled Children
narrative: Find publications, reports, and policy documents that outline teaching methods that are currently in use or expected to be implemented for children with disabilities. Relevant material should detail specific instructional strategies, assistive technologies, inclusive classroom practices, or curriculum adaptations tailored to various disabilities, and should compare present practices with near‑future proposals. Results that omit the focus on disabled children or discuss only general educational topics are not relevant.

title: Long‑lived Radioactive Waste
narrative: Retrieve documents that present evidence‑based, safe, and permanent strategies for managing long‑lived radioactive wastes, such as geological repositories, advanced containment technologies, and long‑term safety evaluations.

title: Organic Soil Enhancers
narrative: Identify documents that discuss the use of organic fertilizers—including composted sludge, ash, vegetable waste, microorganisms, and similar materials—as soil enhancers. Relevant documents should describe the types of organic fertilizers, their effects on soil health and fertility, application techniques, field studies, and comparisons with conventional inorganic fertilizers.

title: Accused Tech Transfer
narrative: Identify the specific entities (companies, organizations, or individuals) that have been formally accused of illicit technology transfer—such as selling products, processes, or formulas—to foreign parties for non‑peaceful purposes, including the nature of the transfer, the foreign recipients, and any related legal actions.

title: Orphan Drugs Issues
narrative: Collect documents that discuss challenges, policies, and market concerns surrounding orphan drugs—medications for diseases that affect relatively few individuals.

title: R&D Cost Influence
narrative: Find documents that explain how research and development expenses influence pharmaceutical pricing, including studies, analyses, and policy discussions.

title: Robotics Applications
narrative: Find current, real-world uses of robotics in sectors such as manufacturing, healthcare, agriculture, logistics, and domestic settings. Relevance requires recent (post‑2015) evidence, credible sources, and clear descriptions of the applications and their impact.

title: Mercy Killing Discourse
narrative: Find documents that discuss mercy killings—including definitions, legal status, ethical debates, case studies, policy implications, and related public attitudes— from academic, legal, policy, or reputable journalistic sources. Relevant excerpts should focus on the concept, arguments, and documented examples of mercy killing practices or discussions thereof.

title: Home Schooling Materials
narrative: Documents that discuss the education of children at home (home schooling), including descriptions of instructional methods, curriculum choices, and policy debates.

title: Tourism‑Driven Local Growth
narrative: Provide documented cases where intentional tourism development strategies have led to measurable improvements in the local economy, such as job creation, increased revenue, or infrastructure upgrades.

title: Sick Building Illness
narrative: Retrieve documents that specifically discuss sick building syndrome or related building‑related illnesses, including causes, symptoms, and mitigation strategies.

title: Automobile Recall Reasons
narrative: Locate documents that describe the causes and contributing factors behind automobile recalls, including manufacturer reports, safety investigations, and news analyses.

title: European Arms Cut
narrative: Search for documents that discuss the European Conventional Arms Cut program and its relation to the dismantlement of European conventional arsenals, including policy objectives, implementation details, and outcomes.

title: Oceanographic Vessel Activities
narrative: Retrieve documents that specifically discuss the activities, missions, or equipment of oceanographic vessels, including research operations and onboard gear.

title: Amazon Conservation Measures
narrative: Investigate the policies, projects, and actions initiated by local South American authorities to protect and preserve the Amazon rainforest, including legislation, monitoring, enforcement, and community‑based initiatives.

title: Language and Culture Barriers
narrative: Find studies that examine how language proficiency and cultural differences hinder the integration of foreign minorities in Germany, focusing on policy impacts, minority perspectives, and measurable integration outcomes.

title: Behavioral Genetics Trends
narrative: Provide recent developments, key research findings, emerging theories, and methodological advances in behavioral genetics and their impact on understanding the relative contributions of genes and environment to behavior or personality.

title: Nutrition and Bone Density
narrative: Search for studies on how potassium, magnesium, and fruit/vegetable intake affect bone mineral density in older adults, aiming to prevent osteoporosis.

title: Irish Peace Talks
narrative: Identify and describe each instance in which peace negotiations in Ireland were postponed, delayed, or otherwise disrupted directly because of violent acts. The relevant evidence should include dates, the nature of the violence, the parties involved, and the immediate effect on the schedule or conduct of the talks.

title: Unexplained Cosmic Events
narrative: The user seeks information on recently detected, unexpected, or unexplained astronomical phenomena—including high‑energy radiation bursts, supernova outbursts, and newly discovered comets—to identify notable cases and understand their scientific significance.

title: Parkinson's Symptom Management
narrative: Provide details on treatments, therapies, and interventions aimed at reducing Parkinson's disease symptoms and preserving functional abilities over the longest possible period.

title: Poaching Impact
narrative: User seeks information on how poaching affects wildlife preserves worldwide, specifically the ecological, economic, and conservation consequences of such illegal hunting activities.

title: Major Tropical Storms
narrative: The user wants a list of tropical storms—both hurricanes and typhoons—that have caused substantial property damage and loss of life. Relevance is determined by documented death tolls, economic impact, and recognition of the storm as a major event (e.g., hurricane Category 3‑5 or equivalent typhoon intensity).

title: Pan Am 103 Litigation
narrative: Search for legal actions, trials, indictments, and settlements that have emerged following the destruction of Pan Am Flight 103 over Lockerbie, Scotland, on December 21, 1988.

title: Schengen Participants
narrative: Identify the countries, institutions, and political entities involved in the Schengen Agreement, and describe the specific goals they aim to achieve by removing border controls across Western Europe.

title: Shipwreck Treasure Recovery
narrative: Seeking details about historical and modern shipwreck salvage operations focused on retrieving valuable artifacts or cargo, including methods, legal issues, notable cases, equipment, and success rates.

title: Airport Security Measures
narrative: Search for documents that describe security measures currently in effect or proposed for implementation in airports, covering policies, technologies, procedures, and regulatory changes.

title: New Steel Production Techniques
narrative: Identify recent and emerging processes for manufacturing steel, including innovations that improve efficiency, reduce emissions, or use alternative raw materials.

title: Cuban Sugar Exports
narrative: Determine the amount of sugar that Cuba exported in recent years and identify the countries that import Cuban sugar.

title: Golden Triangle Drug Trade
narrative: The user requests comprehensive information on drug trafficking in the Golden Triangle region—where Burma, Thailand, and Laos converge—including its history, key actors, trafficking routes, and governmental counter‑drug measures.

title: Three Gorges Dam Status
narrative: Find up‑to‑date information on the current status of the Three Gorges Dam project, including its construction or operational phase, recent milestones, official updates, and any recent news or developments.

title: Creativity Measurement
narrative: Identify established methods for quantifying creative output or potential in individuals or teams. Relevance requires validated scales, psychometric tests, objective metrics, or industry practices that are supported by peer‑reviewed research. Exclude informal or anecdotal measures.

title: Quilt Income Generation
narrative: Identify documented strategies, practices, and case studies where quilts have been employed to generate revenue. Relevant documents should discuss sales channels (online marketplaces, craft fairs, museums, exhibitions), repurposing, tailoring for commercial use, licensing, and community initiatives. Exclude unrelated or purely artistic references without an explicit economic aspect.

title: Tire Recycling Innovations
narrative: Identify recent innovative applications that repurpose discarded automobile tires to reduce waste or improve sustainability. Relevant documents should describe new products, services, or technologies that utilize tires, rather than general recycling processes or policy discussions.

title: Global CO Poisoning
narrative: The user wishes to understand the worldwide prevalence of carbon monoxide poisoning, seeking data on incidence rates, geographic hotspots, and temporal trends to assess how widespread the problem is.

title: Industrial Waste Disposal
narrative: Provide an overview of how industrial firms worldwide dispose of their waste, focusing on techniques, management practices, regulatory compliance, and environmental impact. Relevant documents should describe disposal methods (landfill, incineration, recycling, etc.) used by industrial management globally, including best practices and challenges.

title: Art Theft & Forgery
narrative: Locate documented incidents where artworks were stolen or forged, including details of the artwork, suspect, location, and legal resolution.

title: Mirjana Markovic
narrative: Identify any document or mention that references Mirjana Markovic, the wife of Slobodan Milosevic, including news reports, legal documents, or academic analyses. Relevance requires a clear mention by name and a direct connection to Mr. Milosevic.

title: Suspicious Suicides
narrative: Provide documented cases in which an alleged suicide has been investigated or questioned as possibly murder, including evidence of abnormal circumstances, forensic anomalies, or investigative reconsideration indicating foul play.

title: Modern Money Counterfeiting
narrative: The user is looking for an overview of how money is being counterfeited in contemporary times. The answer should describe the current techniques (e.g., high‑resolution printing, digital currency spoofing, polymer banknote forgery, counterfeit ATM cards, and cryptocurrency mixers), give recent examples or incidents, and note relevant regulatory and technological countermeasures. This information will help the user understand the specific methods and contexts that define today’s counterfeiting practices.

title: Canine Law Enforcement
narrative: Collect international information on the employment of canines by law‑enforcement agencies, including training, deployment, roles, effectiveness, and related policies.  Relevant documents must discuss K9 activities in a global context and not focus solely on other canine uses.

title: UV Eye Damage
narrative: Find documents that describe the harmful effects of solar ultraviolet radiation on vision, including cataract formation, photokeratitis, macular degeneration, and related preventive measures such as protective eyewear.

title: Countries with Declining Birth Rates
narrative: Identify countries other than the United States and China that are experiencing a decline in birth rates, including recent trends, statistics, and relevant demographic context.

title: Legionnaires Outbreaks
narrative: Locate documented outbreaks of Legionnaires' disease, specifying the affected location, date range, number of cases, and any public health investigations or interventions reported by health authorities, research studies, or reputable news outlets.

title: Africanized Bee Attacks
narrative: Find reports or documents detailing incidents where humans were attacked, injured, or killed by Africanized bees, including both fatal and non‑fatal cases.

title: Recent Robotics
narrative: Seek up‑to‑date information on breakthroughs, innovations, and industry trends in robotics technology. Relevant documents should discuss developments from the past few years, including new robotic platforms, AI integration, sensor advances, autonomous systems, manufacturing uses, and related patents or research papers.

title: Police Profiling Stops
narrative: Find evidence or analyses that show whether police departments use profiling when stopping motorists for traffic enforcement. Relevant results should include official policies, investigative reports, or scholarly studies that discuss profiling practices in the context of motor vehicle stops.

title: Modern Stoic Interest
narrative: The user seeks evidence of current interest in Greek Stoic philosophy—such as recent academic work, university courses, media coverage, or popular culture references. Relevant documents should discuss contemporary engagement or citation of Stoicism beyond historical or classical contexts.

title: Estonian Economy
narrative: User seeks current, reliable overview of Estonia’s economic status, covering GDP trends, unemployment, fiscal policy, and key industry sectors.

title: Population Growth Control Measures
narrative: Identify policies, interventions, or programs implemented worldwide that have successfully reduced population growth rates, highlighting the countries most effective in achieving these outcomes. Relevant documents should discuss specific measures, provide evidence of effectiveness, compare country results, and include quantitative data or evaluations of policy impact.

title: Railway Accident Causes
narrative: Find information on the contributing factors to railway accidents worldwide, including technical failures, human error, environmental conditions, and organizational issues.

title: Residential Deregulation Impact
narrative: Find documents that detail how residential utility customers have experienced the deregulation of gas and electric services. Relevance is determined by evidence of changes in pricing, service quality, customer choice, satisfaction, or market competition affecting households following deregulation.

title: Tourism Growth
narrative: Identify countries that have experienced a recent increase in inbound tourism arrivals (e.g., the last five years) based on reliable statistics. Relevant results should show a consistent upward trend in visitor numbers, excluding temporary or one‑off spikes or non‑official data.

title: New Inventions
narrative: List inventions or scientific discoveries that have been made recently, across all fields of science and technology.

title: Child Labor Abolition
narrative: The user seeks information on specific actions, policies, regulations, and corporate strategies currently implemented or planned by governments and companies in order to reduce or eliminate child labor exploitation. Relevance requires documents that discuss enacted laws, enforcement measures, corporate social responsibility initiatives, supply‑chain monitoring, certification schemes, community‑based education projects, and joint initiatives between state and business sectors. The search results should cover worldwide or regionally specific cases, include policy analysis or outcomes, and cite credible sources such as government reports, NGO studies, corporate disclosures, and academic research published in the past decade.

title: Lyme Disease Management
narrative: Search results should provide evidence‑based information on preventing Lyme disease (tick avoidance, landscaping, repellents, monitoring for nymphs), early detection (symptom recognition, testing methods), and effective treatment protocols (antibiotic regimens, prophylactic guidelines, post‑treatment care, and management of persistent symptoms).

title: Selfless Heroic Acts
